name: Aromatic Chicken with Rice (Malaysia)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread cooked rice in a pie pan.
2. Chop chicken into large pieces.
3. Cut onion into wedges.
4. Heat sesame oil in a wok or large pan and brown the chicken with the onions until the onions are transparent.
5. Add soy sauce, salt, and pepper.
6. Place the chicken on top of the cooked rice in the pie plate.
7. Steam for about 30 minutes or until the chicken is done.
8. Serve warm.
If you have a rice cooker, place the braised onions and chicken on top of the raw rice and cook it that way.
